description: The Governed721 organization governs a Governed721 NFT contract (deployed at 0x8a7E4c50aa40497118f66D7DE54D0Daebf9489E0) and manages the distribution of royalties in this collection of NFTs. Three types of stakeholders - Artists, Owners and Operators - decide on how revenues from resale of artists are distributed. Together, they elect executive that are responsible for enforcement of split payments by blacklisting any account that is deemed non-compliant.
